daily_summary.headline: Exciting Space Launches and Aurora Opportunities Await!

top_events.title: Atlas V 551 | Amazon Leo (LA-05) Launch
top_events.description: United Launch Alliance's Atlas V 551 rocket is set to launch Amazon Leo satellites, expanding broadband internet access globally.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for real-time updates.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 10-44 Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 will deploy another batch of Starlink satellites, enhancing global internet coverage.
top_events.action: Tune in to the live webcast for launch coverage.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A potential aurora event with Kp index of 4 is expected, best visible at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check the sky if you're in northern regions.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
